title: hieracium pellitum subsp. pseudolaggeri
intro: Hieracium pellitum subsp. pseudolaggeri, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium pellitum subsp. pseudolaggeri is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or added to food products.
